text:
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: RELATIONSHIP_DESC 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
15 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
New = no link to a plan in the prior year 
Renewal = same plan & contract in reference and prior years (portion of service area may be different) 

Consolidation = 2 or more plans in the prior year consolidated into a single plan 
Split = 2 or more plans in the current year associated with a single plan & contract ID in prior year 

Termination = plan appeared in prior year, not active in
